Your آ§nMain Attacksآ§7 will alternate between

آ§2â‍¼ آ§7Range: آ§f4.5 Blocks

آ§câڑ” آ§7Total Damage: آ§f200% آ§8(Spell Damage)

   آ§8(آ§câœ¹ آ§8Fire: 20%)
آ§3âک€ آ§7Radius: آ§f4.5 Blocks

Enemies take damage to discharge آ§c-1 آ§bStatic آ§eâڑ،آ§7

   آ§8(آ§eâœ¦ آ§8Thunder: 10%)

After a brief delay, unleash a powerful

              آ§fBlindnessآ§7 (آ§câ¬£آ§7) to Enemies
